title: Communauté de communes FerCher
summary: The communauté de communes FerCher (before 2021: FerCher - Pays florentais) is located in the Cher département of the Centre-Val de Loire region of France. It was created on 1 January 2001 and its seat is the town Saint-Florent-sur-Cher. Its area is 232.0 km2, and its population was 11,527 in 2018.
text:
The communauté de communes FerCher (before 2021: FerCher - Pays florentais) is located in the Cher département of the Centre-Val de Loire region of France. It was created on 1 January 2001 and its seat is the town Saint-Florent-sur-Cher. Its area is 232.0 km2, and its population was 11,527 in 2018.

Composition
The communauté de communes consists of the following 9 communes:
